sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الطِّفْلُ أَنْ يَغْسِلَ يَدَيْهِ قَبْلَ الْأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je naučilo prati ruke prije jela.
sentences.translationEn: The child learned to wash his hands before eating.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ أَبُوهُ يُذَكِّرُهُ بِذَلِكَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Otac ga je na to podsećao svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: His father used to remind him of that every day.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: النَّظَافَةُ مِنَ الصِّحَّةِ وَالدِّينِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: Čistoća je dio zdravlja i vjere.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: Cleanliness is part of health and religion.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الطِّفْلُ يَغْسِلُ يَدَيْهِ دَائِمًا قَبْلَ الْأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je počelo uvijek prati ruke prije jela.
sentences.translationEn: The child started always washing his hands before eating.
